judgeScores.justification: The campaign maintains a unified 'Light That Learns Your Day' voice across all deliverables, skillfully avoiding clichéd lighting metaphors in favor of specific remote-work pain points like the '3 PM crash' and calendar-synced automation. It exceeds minimum requirements with 12 social posts (double the asked minimum) and 10 comprehensive FAQ questions, while demonstrating strong audience fit through platform-tailored tones (data-driven LinkedIn versus lifestyle Instagram). Minor weaknesses include slightly vague 'AI-powered' technical claims and heavy repetition of the same beta statistics across files—strategically consistent but reducing content variety.
